info.name: Monitour API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Monitour – Smart Operations, Surveillance & Workforce Management Platform.

## Quick Start
1. Set the `baseUrl` variable to `http://localhost:8000` (or your deployed API origin).
2. Run **Login (Admin)** or **Login (Manager)** – the `accessToken` variable is set automatically.
3. Authenticated requests use the collection Bearer token.

## OpenAPI (keep in sync)
In Postman: **Import → Link** → `{{baseUrl}}/openapi.json` to merge the latest paths from the running server.

## WesenseU & verification
Room verification (`POST /verification/task/{task_id}`) queues **Celery**; the worker downloads stored image URLs and POSTs **multipart** to WesenseU with optional **`benchmark_image_url`** and **`room_category`**. Run **WesenseU** on port **8001** and a **Celery worker** for end-to-end AI callbacks.

## Credentials (dev seed)
| Role | Email | Password |
|------|-------|----------|
| Super Admin | admin@monitour.in | Admin@2026 |
| Property Manager | manager@grandpalace.com | Manager@123 |
| Dept Manager | hk_head@grandpalace.com | DeptHead@123 |
| Employee | priya@grandpalace.com | Password@123 |

## P0–P2 flows (2026-05-20)
Folders: Catalog, Onboarding, Contacts, F&B, Vendors, Guest Stays, Task SLA, Room Categories, Property Schedules, Department Duties, Rooms Bulk, extended Tasks/Inventory/Attendance/Reports.
See `docs/CRUD_VERIFICATION.md` and `docs/REQUIREMENTS_FLOW_VERIFICATION.md`.

query.description: Required when logged in as super_admin

request.description: Property-scoped users omit `property_id` (backend uses their property). Super admin must pass `property_id`.

body.raw:
{
  "property_id": "{{propertyId}}",
  "room_id": "{{roomId}}",
  "task_type": "cleaning",
  "priority": "high",
  "description": "Deep clean and sanitize room before next check-in",
  "assigned_to": "{{employeeId}}"
}

request.description: Valid statuses: pending → assigned → in_progress → verification_pending → completed → approved

body.raw:
{
  "property_id": "{{propertyId}}",
  "room_id": "{{roomId}}",
  "ticket_type": "maintenance",
  "priority": "medium",
  "title": "AC not cooling",
  "description": "The air conditioning unit in room 301 is not cooling below 26 degrees. Needs servicing.",
  "reported_by_name": "Reception Staff"
}

{
  "property_id": "{{propertyId}}",
  "room_id": "{{roomId}}",
  "ticket_type": "housekeeping",
  "priority": "low",
  "title": "Need extra towels",
  "description": "Please send 2 extra bath towels to room 301.",
  "reported_by_name": "Guest"
}

request.description: Public endpoint – no auth required. Used by guest portal via QR code.
Valid statuses: open → assigned → in_progress → resolved → closed

body.raw:
{
  "property_id": "{{propertyId}}",
  "room_id": "{{roomId}}",
  "guest_name": "Alice Johnson",
  "rating": 5,
  "review_text": "Excellent stay! The room was clean and the staff was friendly. Best hotel experience!",
  "category": "overall"
}

request.description: Public endpoint – no auth required. Used by guest portal.
Status flow: pending → confirmed → preparing → out_for_delivery → delivered

Upload room photos (multipart `files`). Returns 202 and queues Celery: worker downloads each stored URL, resolves optional benchmark + room category, POSTs multipart to WesenseU `/rooms/verify`, then WesenseU callbacks `POST /api/v1/verification/callback`. Requires running Celery + WesenseU for full flow.
Set customerId from B2B customer UUID
Super admin only. Lists public schema tables, columns, row counts, and soft-delete flags.
